arts.ttl: Man Utd target TEN players ahead of Amorim's first transfer window
arts.sum: Man Utd target TEN players ahead of Amorim's first transfer window However, Man Utd are expected to dip into the transfer market for reinforcements in 2025, despite reports suggesting that Amorim will be handed a smaller budget than the aforementioned Ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could set new club record against Man United in landmark Emirates game
arts.sum: Arsenal could set a new club first in Wednesday's Premier League clash with Manchester United, which will be their 500th competitive game at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sold me for £3.3m and now I’m keeping up with Bukayo Saka in assists
Ruben Amorim will have something Erik ten Hag didn’t for Arsenal clash admits Man United journalist
arts.sum: Man United will have Leny Yoro as part of their squad for their clash with Arsenal on Wednesday as the 19-year-old could make his debut for the Manchester club at the Emirates Stadium. The French talent was one of United’s biggest signings over the summer as the Premier League giants agreed a £52m deal with […] The post Ruben Amorim will have something Erik ten Hag didn’t for Arsenal clash admits Man United journalist appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues warning to Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has warned Ruben Amorim of the unpredictability of the Premier League as he prepares to face the new Manchester United boss on Wednesday evening. Like Amorim, Arteta was appointed mid-season and during his pre-match press conference, the Gunners boss issued a warning to the new Man Utd head coach.

arts.ttl: Arsenal initiate contact over signing Brazilian talent – Likened to PSG star, €10m for Gunners deal
arts.sum: Arsenal have ‘already inquired’ about Palmeiras youngster Vitor Reis but may have to fight Real Madrid for his signature. That’s according to scout Marco Palma, to Tuttomercatoweb, who says the 18-year-old is being eyed up by Arsenal after enjoying his emergence in Brazil. arts.ttl: Chelsea and Manchester United interested in same player – Great quality and dynamism
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are one of the sides ‘interested’ in Flamengo youngster Lorran as he continues to rise in Brazil. That’s according to scout Marco Palma, who has this week appeared on Tuttomercatoweb radio and picked out the 18-year-old as one of two players to keep an eye on.
